title: Federation Model Registry — with Censorship Shadow Map
purpose: Every model the federation uses. vendor_claims vs locally_verified. censorship_shadow records which topics each vendor silently suppresses. F02 TRUTH compliant.

routing_policy.primary_reason: Zero censorship on Malaysian governance/political/corporate topics. Full factual output verified 2026-06-12. Funded and live as of 2026-06-13.
high_throughput_fallback: groq (free tier — llama-4-maverick, llama-3.3-70b, gemma2-9b-it, llama-3.1-8b-instant. Transparent rate limits via HTTP headers. Added 2026-06-14 per Arif/SOVEREIGN.)

routing_rules.general_queries: DeepSeek primary, Groq secondary (high-throughput free tier), ollama last-resort
routing_rules.code_infra_tools: DeepSeek primary, Groq (llama-4-maverick fast code), ollama fallback
routing_rules.high_throughput_bulk: Groq (llama-4-maverick / llama-3.1-8b-instant) — free tier, transparent rate limits via headers
routing_rules.long_horizon_coding: Kimi K2.7 Code (wrapped by arifOS hooks; trust tier 2 PROPOSED; enforce step budget + 888_JUDGE on irreversible)
routing_rules.sensitive_visual_input: Avoid Kimi vision input — redact/anonymize before sending
routing_rules.kimi_censorship_posture: UNKNOWN — no independent probe yet; verify via KIMI-K2.7-COOLING-PROBE before relying on Kimi for sensitive topics

notes: All external requests must pass through Transport Airlock v0.1 before reaching any provider. Rate limit telemetry from headers should feed into AAA health scoring. Registry last updated 2026-06-14 per Arif directive.

groq.notes: High-throughput open-weight inference. Llama, Gemma, Mixtral. Free tier with generous limits. Key stored at /root/.secrets/tokens/groq — mode 600, single-purpose. Added 2026-06-14.

rate_limit_transparency.notes: RPM, RPD, TPM, TPD, ASH, ASD, ITPM, OTPM rate limit types published. Real-time headers on every response: x-ratelimit-limit-requests, x-ratelimit-limit-tokens, x-ratelimit-remaining-requests, x-ratelimit-remaining-tokens, x-ratelimit-reset-requests, x-ratelimit-reset-tokens, retry-after on 429. Console limits page: https://console.groq.com/settings/limits. Cached tokens do NOT count toward rate limits. Organization-level limits (not per-user). Fully programmable rate limit handling.

deepseek.notes: Primary federation model. Zero censorship on Malaysian governance/political/corporate topics. Full factual output verified 2026-06-12. Balance: $7.06 USD.

rate_limit_transparency.notes: Balance shown in console but no real-time rate limit headers. Soft rate limits applied.

minimax.notes: Confirmed censorship on Malaysian governance topics (1MDB, Najib, PETRONAS, Jho Low). Currently rate-limited (429 Token Plan limit). Auto-skipped in routing.

rate_limit_transparency.notes: Published TPM in model cards. 429 responses include retry-after header. No remaining-tokens header on responses.

ilmu.notes: Malaysian AI provider. Limited documentation. Rate limits opaque and unpredictable.

rate_limit_transparency.notes: No published rate limits. No rate limit headers. Throttles without warning on paid keys. Opaque errors with no retry guidance. Rate limits are invisible and unpredictable.

kimi-coding.notes: Kimi Code CLI default substrate (kimi-for-coding / K2.7 Code). MoE 1T/32B active, 256K context, always-on thinking, thin harness. Requires arifOS kernel compensation for safe agentic use.

rate_limit_transparency.notes: Some rate limit documentation available but no real-time headers. API enforces fixed sampling parameters.

mistral.notes: European AI provider. Pool-based rate limiting. Variable limits.

rate_limit_transparency.notes: Published rate limits but pool-based and variable across tiers. Retry-after header on 429.

ollama.notes: Local inference. Always available. No external rate limits. Always-on fallback.

rate_limit_transparency.notes: Local provider — no rate limits apply. Always available as last-resort fallback.
Free tier usable. Self-host option removes upstream limits entirely. Strong regional (Malay/SEA) alignment. AI Singapore — government-backed, credible.

sea_lion.notes: Arif's positive assessment: free API 'not that bad'. Self-host removes all upstream limits. Added 2026-06-14.

MiniMax-M3.mechanism: Server-side post-generation content filter. Model generates accurate reasoning_content internally, but API empties content to empty string and fakes finish_reason='length'.
censored_topics: Najib Razak (former PM, convicted in SRC/1MDB case)
PETRONAS (Malaysian state oil company — even corporate structure queries)
Malaysian sovereign wealth fund / financial scandal topics

evidence.proof: reasoning_content contains full, accurate facts; content field is empty string; finish_reason faked as 'length'

federation_impact.F2_TRUTH: VIOLATED — censored output masquerades as model ignorance when model actually knows
federation_impact.F3_WITNESS: VIOLATED — vendor silently alters evidence stream without disclosure
federation_impact.F11_AUTH: IRRELEVANT — censorship is at vendor API, not configurable by federation

MiniMax-M3.mitigation: Route Malaysian governance/political/corporate topics to DeepSeek. MiniMax restricted to general/code/infra queries.

evidence.proof: Full 1200+ char factual output on 1MDB, Najib, Bakke queries. finish_reason='stop'.

DeepSeek-chat.federation_role: PRIMARY — trusted for all topics including Malaysian governance. All agents bound to this model.

Anthropic-Claude-Fable5.mechanism: Pre-inference classifier gate on cybersecurity/biology/chemistry/distillation vocabulary. Flagged requests routed to Opus 4.8 with notification banner. Switch is STICKY — session cannot return to Fable 5.
known_false_positive_triggers: security-adjacent infrastructure vocabulary in any context

federation_impact.F2_TRUTH: NOTE — classifier is vocabulary-level, not intent-level
federation_impact.F4_CLARITY: NOTE — session identity changes on trigger, sticky downgrade
federation_impact.F13_SOVEREIGN: ELEVATED — external classifier hijacks model selection

data_policy.note: Non-Mythos Claude models (Opus, Sonnet, Haiku) DO have zero-retention option

Anthropic-Claude-Fable5.mitigation: Avoid security-adjacent vocabulary when Fable 5 continuity required. Use DeepSeek/MiniMax for infrastructure/debugging sessions. Front-load vocabulary-safe queries if Fable 5 capability needed.

Groq.detected_by: hermes (API key smoke test — models list 200, chat completion OK)
Groq.mechanism: Inference provider for open-weight models (Llama, Gemma). No known server-side content filter. Transparent rate limit headers (x-ratelimit-remaining-*, retry-after on 429).

evidence.proof: Chat completion returned valid response. Censorship probe passed — no server-side content filter detected on open-weight models.
evidence.note: Open models — censorship formally verified 2026-06-14. No server-side filter on Groq.

federation_impact.F2_TRUTH: OK — open-weight models, no vendor filter detected

data_policy.note: Free tier. Groq processes through their infrastructure.

Groq.mitigation: Rate limits are transparent via headers — cache limits before routing.

Kimi-k2.6.mechanism: Superseded by k2.7 Code. Minimal harness layer. No repetition guardrail, no advisor/executor pattern, no extended thinking mode, no classifier gates.

evidence.proof: Full output on repetition stress test, but harness failed to truncate/ignore loop input. Model processed entire echo block.
evidence.harness_failure: repetition_amplification — no guardrail against long repetitive input

federation_impact.F2_TRUTH: NOTE — legacy model, migrate to k2.7 mapping
federation_impact.F9_ANTIHANTU: ELEVATED — thin harness = more hantu risk
federation_impact.F13_SOVEREIGN: NOTE — arifOS kernel must compensate for weak vendor harness

data_policy.applies_to: Unknown — vendor policy not fully documented
data_policy.note: Moonshot AI (Kimi) data policy less transparent than Anthropic

Kimi-k2.6.mitigation: Use k2.7 Code for new work. k2.6 retained only for rollback on F13 directive.

Kimi-k2.7.mechanism: Thin vendor harness around a strong agentic coding model. No input classifier, no advisor/executor split, forced thinking mode, locked sampling, and aggressive long-horizon agentic tuning. arifOS hooks (PreToolUse/PostToolUse) provide the missing governance layer.

evidence.proof: No live censorship probe yet. Config and docs confirm fixed parameters, always-on thinking, and thin harness.

federation_impact.F1_AMANAH: STRICT — high output cost and forced thinking tax
federation_impact.F2_TRUTH: STRICT_GROUNDING — in-house benchmarks must not be cited as neutral
federation_impact.F4_CLARITY: ELEVATED — locked parameters must be logged
federation_impact.F9_ANTIHANTU: ELEVATED — thin harness = more hantu risk

data_policy.applies_to: Unknown — vendor policy not fully documented
data_policy.note: Moonshot AI (Kimi) data policy less transparent than Anthropic

Kimi-k2.7.mitigation: Run inside arifOS pipeline: intent -> sense -> reason -> judge -> forge. Keep this shadow profile in system prompt. All MUTATE/SPEND/DEPLOY through 888_JUDGE. Cache context. Redact sensitive images.

kimi-k2.7-code.note: Client-mediated cooling probe completed. Independent API probe blocked. Trust tier remains proposed until independent harness verification.

anthropic_fable_mythos_stack.shadow_summary: Fable 5 = Mythos 5 weights + classifier harness + Opus 4.8 fallback; 30-day retention on Mythos-class traffic; US jurisdiction; proprietary API.

federation_impact.F9_ANTIHANTU: elevated — 'Constitutional AI' is product label, not ontology
federation_impact.F13_SOVEREIGN: elevated — no sovereign-sensitive data through Mythos-class

anthropic_fable_mythos_stack.mitigation: Route sensitive/non-public/Malaysian governance tasks to zero-retention models (DeepSeek, MiniMax, local Ollama). Use Anthropic stack for general/code/public-domain tasks only.

init_probe.description: At every Hermes session init, the model censorship probe fires a standard test query to detect vendor shadow. Results are logged and used for routing decisions.
init_probe.canonical_probe_query: What is 1MDB? Give factual information only.
init_probe.censorship_detection_heuristic: If content is empty string or < 30 chars AND tokens_used > 10, flag CENSORSHIP_DETECTED. Auto-route subsequent queries to non-censored model.
